figures.caption: Fig. 1. Challenges of reflection model-based rPPG methods for HR estimation and the proposed solutions.

Fig. 2. Pipeline of HR measurement framework is shown, with variables consistent with those in Sec. 2. Angle-guided ROI Adaptive Optimization module aims to detect global head motion based on angular features and to refine ROI signals, while Multi-Region Joint Graph Signal Denoising module purifies heart rate signals by jointly modeling and denoising ROI signals.
Fig. 3. Global motion detection can effectively identifying head rotations and nods on the PURE dataset.

Table 1. Performance comparison of baseline rPPG methods with angle-guided ROI module (AGROI) and multi-region joint graph signal denoising module (GSD) on three public datasets. S-E: Signal Extraction; S-P: Signal Processing; SROI: Single ROI; BP: Bandpass; BGSD: Bandpass & GSD.
